⚠ Compliance Deadline

State & local government WCAG 2.1 AA compliance required as of April 2026. Healthcare Section 504 deadline: May 11, 2026.

Home›Nonprofits
Language Access for Nonprofits

Your mission is to serve everyone.
Language access makes that possible.

Certified translation, interpretation, and digital accessibility for nonprofits serving diverse communities. Title VI compliant for federally funded programs. Flexible pricing for mission-driven organizations. 300+ languages.

Title VIEO 13166WCAG 2.1Mission-Friendly Pricing
Get Nonprofit Quote → Compliance FAQ

Nonprofits that receive federal grants are covered by Title VI and EO 13166 language access requirements — the same rules that apply to government agencies. We help mission-driven organizations meet these obligations on a nonprofit budget.

Nonprofit services inquiry

Tell us about your organization. We offer mission-aligned pricing.

Mission-aligned pricing available
Your compliance obligations

Federal grant funding brings federal
language access obligations.

If your nonprofit receives any federal financial assistance — including federal grants, Head Start funding, CDBG grants, Title I subgrants, HHS program funds, or housing assistance — you are covered by Title VI and EO 13166 language access requirements. This includes translation of vital documents and provision of interpreter services for LEP individuals you serve.

📜

Title VI Compliance

Translate vital documents into the languages spoken by 5% or more of your service population. Provide qualified interpreters for service encounters. Develop and maintain a Language Access Plan. We do all of this.

🌐

Digital Accessibility

Nonprofit websites and digital content should meet WCAG 2.1 AA — both for legal compliance and because your community deserves accessible information. We audit and remediate nonprofit digital content at mission-friendly rates.

📋

Language Access Plans

A written Language Access Plan is the best evidence of good-faith compliance. Many federal funders now require one. We develop LAPs tailored to your service population, languages, and program types.

Nonprofits we serve

Every type of mission-driven organization
that serves diverse communities.

Refugee Resettlement

Case documents, benefits enrollment, employment forms, and all resettlement materials in 50+ refugee community languages.

Social Services

Intake forms, service agreements, case notes, and community communications in all client languages.

Legal Aid

Client intake interpretation, document translation, and court-adjacent services for LEP clients served by legal aid programs.

Head Start / Early Childhood

Family engagement materials, home visit communications, and enrollment forms in all family languages.

Food Banks & Pantries

Client intake, eligibility forms, program rules, and community outreach materials for diverse service populations.

Housing & Shelter

Lease agreements, tenant rights notices, intake forms, and housing counseling materials in all resident languages.

Community Health

Patient communications, health education materials, and care coordination for diverse community health organizations.

Faith-Based Social Services

Social service materials, community event communications, and program documents for faith communities serving LEP populations.

Language access should be part of every nonprofit's budget — and it's more affordable than you think.

We offer mission-aligned pricing, volume discounts, and annual subscription options for nonprofits with ongoing language access needs.
